channel.title: FRC Mac DS Updates
channel.description: Most recent updates to FRC Mac DS

item.title: Version 0.0.1
item.description:
v0.0.1

FRC Driver Station for macOS

A native macOS FRC Driver Station that communicates with roboRIO robots using the 2020-2026 FRC protocol.

Features

  • Robot Communication — Full FRC DS protocol implementation over UDP (ports 1110/1150) and TCP (port 1740), including joystick data, date/time sync, and status monitoring
  • Robot Control — Enable/disable in Teleoperated, Autonomous, and Test modes with E-STOP support
  • Joystick Support — Native HID joystick/gamepad detection with drag-and-drop slot assignment (6 slots), live axis/button/POV preview
  • Live Telemetry — Battery voltage with sparkline history, robot CPU/RAM/disk usage, CAN utilization, PC CPU and battery monitoring
  • Log Viewer — Color-coded robot stdout and error messages with level filtering, full text selection/copy, and auto-scroll
  • Log Sessions — Automatically saves logs per robot connection; browse and review past sessions
  • Customizable Keybinds — Full keyboard shortcut editor in Settings (Cmd+,) with per-action recording and conflict detection
  • Auto-Updates — Sparkle integration for seamless in-app updates
  • Always-on-Top Window — Floats above other windows across all spaces, like the official DS

Default Keyboard Shortcuts

| Action | Shortcut |

|--------|----------|

| Disable | Enter |

| E-STOP | Space |

| Teleoperated | Cmd+T |

| Autonomous | Cmd+U |

| Test | Cmd+Y |

| Connect/Disconnect | Cmd+K |

| Tabs 1-4 | Cmd+1-4 |

Full Changelog: https://github.com/taciturnaxolotl/frc-macos-ds/commits/v0.0.1
